requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Electrical Safety — IEC 62109 Baseline, UL 1741 Expectations, and NEMA Installation Fit
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器电气安全——IEC 62109基准、UL 1741期望及NEMA安装适配
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器電氣安全——IEC 62109基準、UL 1741期望及NEMA安裝適配

summary.en: For Palau PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety evidence remains a useful international baseline for PV inverter electrical safety. However, because The Palau uses a US-heritage 120/240 V, 60 Hz, NEMA-style ecosystem, project owners, utilities, insurers, or inspectors may request UL 1741 inverter evidence, NEMA-compatible ratings and installation details, and documentation for field wiring, grounding, disconnects, surge protection, and enclosure suitability. Outdoor equipment should also be reviewed for coastal corrosion, high humidity, salt mist, and hurricane-prone service conditions.
summary.zh: 巴劳光伏项目中，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全证据仍是有用的国际光伏逆变器电气安全基准。但由于巴劳使用美式120/240 V、60 Hz、NEMA式生态，项目业主、公用事业、保险方或检查人员可能要求UL 1741逆变器证据、NEMA兼容等级和安装细节，以及现场接线、接地、断开装置、浪涌保护和外壳适用性文件。户外设备还应审查沿海腐蚀、高湿、盐雾和飓风多发服役条件。
summary.zht: 巴勞光伏項目中，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全證據仍是有用的國際光伏逆變器電氣安全基準。但由於巴勞使用美式120/240 V、60 Hz、NEMA式生態，項目業主、公用事業、保險方或檢查人員可能要求UL 1741逆變器證據、NEMA相容等級和安裝細節，以及現場接線、接地、斷開裝置、浪湧保護和外殼適用性文件。戶外設備還應審查沿海腐蝕、高濕、鹽霧和颶風多發服役條件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources (may be requested for US-heritage systems)
NEMA-style installation ecosystem — enclosure, wiring, disconnect, and field-installation compatibility as specified by the project reviewer

summary.en: China PV inverter safety and construction files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, manufacturer declarations, CNAS test reports, and CQC/CGC voluntary certification. These documents may show China domestic safety compliance for a 220/380 V, 50 Hz product configuration. They are not automatic evidence of IEC 62109-1/-2 certification, UL 1741 certification, NEMA installation suitability, or Palau coastal/hurricane environmental fitness.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全和结构文件通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、制造商声明、CNAS测试报告及CQC/CGC自愿认证。这些文件可证明220/380 V、50 Hz产品配置的中国国内安全合规，但不能自动证明IEC 62109-1/-2认证、UL 1741认证、NEMA安装适用性或巴劳沿海/飓风环境适应性。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全和結構文件通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、製造商聲明、CNAS測試報告及CQC/CGC自願認證。這些文件可證明220/380 V、50 Hz產品配置的中國國內安全合規，但不能自動證明IEC 62109-1/-2認證、UL 1741認證、NEMA安裝適用性或巴勞沿海/颶風環境適應性。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC/CGC voluntary certification schemes and CNAS laboratory reports for China domestic PV inverter products

gap.en: Gap: exporters should supplement Chinese safety files with an international/Palau project package. At minimum, confirm IEC 62109-1/-2 model-family coverage, 60 Hz nameplate and firmware configuration, NEMA-compatible wiring and enclosure details, grounding and disconnect instructions, surge-protection coordination, and coastal environmental ratings. Where the reviewer asks for UL 1741, Chinese GB/T evidence cannot substitute. If the same hardware is offered in both China 50 Hz and Palau 60 Hz variants, the test report and nameplate file should clearly identify the Palau variant.
gap.zh: 差距：出口商应以国际/巴劳项目文件补充中国安全文件。至少应确认IEC 62109-1/-2型号系列覆盖、60 Hz铭牌和固件配置、NEMA兼容接线和外壳细节、接地和断开说明、浪涌保护配合，以及沿海环境等级。若审查方要求UL 1741，中国GB/T证据不能替代。若同一硬件同时提供中国50 Hz和巴劳60 Hz版本，测试报告和铭牌文件应清楚识别巴劳版本。
gap.zht: 差距：出口商應以國際/巴勞項目文件補充中國安全文件。至少應確認IEC 62109-1/-2型號系列覆蓋、60 Hz銘牌和韌體配置、NEMA相容接線和外殼細節、接地和斷開說明、浪湧保護配合，以及沿海環境等級。若審查方要求UL 1741，中國GB/T證據不能替代。若同一硬體同時提供中國50 Hz和巴勞60 Hz版本，測試報告和銘牌文件應清楚識別巴勞版本。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice through utility, inspector, owner, insurer, or procurement requirements; UL 1741 is not assumed universally mandatory but should be checked for each Palau project
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or domestic project-driven; China GB/T safety evidence does not automatically satisfy Palau IEC 62109, UL 1741, NEMA, or environmental documentation expectations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 as the baseline safety file, then confirm whether UL 1741 and NEMA-style installation documentation are required for the specific Palau project. Chinese GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should be treated as supporting material only unless the project reviewer expressly accepts it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应以IEC 62109-1/-2作为基础安全文件，再确认具体巴劳项目是否要求UL 1741和NEMA式安装文件。除非项目审查方明确接受，中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全证据仅应作为支持材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應以IEC 62109-1/-2作為基礎安全文件，再確認具體巴勞項目是否要求UL 1741和NEMA式安裝文件。除非項目審查方明確接受，中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全證據僅應作為支持材料。
